channel_priority_tip: Channels with higher priority are more likely to be used.
confirm_delete_channel: Are you sure you want to delete the channel ({{name}})?
max_temperature_tip: Model temperature parameter. Leave it blank if not supported.
rerank_max_token_tip: Token limit per request in reranking stage (query + single document). Documents exceeding the limit will be automatically split.
selected_model_empty: Please select at least one model.
vlm_model_tip: When knowledge contains images, you can configure an image parsing model to recognize text and structural information (e.g., tables, flowcharts).
model_permission_config_hint: If no collaborators are specified, a model is available for all members by default.
model_permission_public_hint: Currently, it is public. After adding collaborators, it will automatically switch to private.
evaluation_model_tip: Used to evaluate apps and quality of data in datasets.
dataset_still_processing_tip: Still being processed. Training is not supported.
train_dataset_vector_model_mismatch: The vector model of this knowledge base is different from the current model and does not support training.
train_select_base_model_first: Please select a base model first.
base_model_train_tip: Base models can be trained to generate new models, which can be selected and used in apps and knowledge bases.
train_detail_rerank_result_tip:
Hit@5: If at least one correct knowledge is included in the first 5 knowledge items retrieved by the rerank model, it is considered a hit. The higher the overall hit rate, the stronger the reliability of the rerank model in locating the correct knowledge.

Hit@10: If at least one correct knowledge is included in the first 10 knowledge items ranked by the rerank model, it is considered a hit. The higher the overall hit rate, the stronger the reliability of the rerank model in locating the correct knowledge.

MRR@10: The position of the first correct knowledge in the top 10 knowledge items after re-ranking. The higher the position, the higher the score (1 for the first position, 0 if not in the top 10). It can be used to measure the accuracy of knowledge re-ranking and whether the correct knowledge is ranked higher.
train_detail_embedding_result_tip:
Hit@5: If at least one correct knowledge is included in the first 5 knowledge items retrieved by the retrieval model, it is considered a hit. The higher the overall hit rate, the stronger the reliability of the retrieval model in locating the correct knowledge.

Hit@10: If at least one correct knowledge is included in the first 10 knowledge items retrieved by the retrieval model, it is considered a hit. The higher the overall hit rate, the stronger the reliability of the retrieval model in locating the correct knowledge.

MRR@10: The position of the first correct knowledge in the first 10 knowledge items retrieved by the retrieval model. The higher the position, the higher the score (1 for the first position, 0 if not in the first 10). It can be used to measure whether the retrieved knowledge is accurate and whether the correct knowledge is ranked higher.
train_detail_result_worse_tip: The current evaluation metric is not better than the previous version. To avoid performance fluctuations, the model is not updated.
train_detail_confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this task record?
model_referenced_by_resources: This model is referenced by the following apps/datasets. To ensure normal operation, please switch to another model first
model_must_be_public_to_set_default: Default model must be public. Please set the model permission to "All members available" first
model_is_default_cannot_be_private: This model is currently set as a default model and cannot be set to private. Please remove it from default models first
collaborator_must_cover_references: This model is referenced by the following members' apps/datasets. Adding collaborators will make it private. Please also add the referencing members as collaborators
collaborator_has_reference: Cannot remove this collaborator because their apps/datasets reference this model
